description: ADMET property prediction for small molecules using ChemProp v2 neural networks
overview: Predicts ADMET (Absorption, Distribution, Metabolism, Excretion, Toxicity) molecular properties
using pre-trained ChemProp v2 neural networks running in a Docker container.
Single molecule: click on a molecule cell — the Admetica panel appears in the
context panel (Biology section) with predictions for that molecule.
Batch predictions: Top Menu > Chem > Admetica > Calculate... Opens a dialog
to select models, templates, and visualization options (pie charts, forms).
Results are added as color-coded columns to the table.
Accepts SMILES and molblock inputs, falls back to CPU when GPU is unavailable.
